items.name: Hot Honey Chicken
items.description: Tender Chicken, Mike’s Hot HoneyⓇ – Extra Hot with ranch, cheddar cheese, bacon and lettuce.
items.simplified_description: Spicy chicken sandwich with ranch, cheese, bacon, and lettuce.

items.name: Lobster Classic
items.description: Lobster & seafood salad with shredded lettuce on butter-toasted Italian white bread.
items.simplified_description: Lobster salad sandwich on toasted bread.

items.name: Classic Italian
items.description: Stacked with pepperoni, salami, spicy capicola and smoked ham with melted provolone, black olives, fresh lettuce, tomatoes, onions, and tangy banana peppers, with zesty red wine vinaigrette, served toasted.
items.simplified_description: Italian meat sandwich with various toppings and dressing.

items.name: Black Angus Steakhouse
items.description: A steakhouse classic, Black Angus steak, melted provolone and cheddar cheeses, sauteed mushrooms and onions, with our zesty grill sauce on our rosemary parmesan bread, served toasted.
items.simplified_description: Steak sandwich with cheese, mushrooms, and onions on special bread.

items.name: Turkey Ranch Swiss
items.description: Oven roasted turkey breast, melted Swiss cheese, fresh lettuce, tomatoes, and onions, with creamy ranch dressing, served toasted.
items.simplified_description: Turkey sandwich with Swiss cheese and ranch dressing.

items.name: Chicken Carbonara
items.description: The legendary Chicken Carbonara made with grilled chicken, crispy bacon, melted provolone cheese, sauteed mushrooms, and our classic parmesan alfredo sauce, served toasted.
items.simplified_description: Chicken sandwich with bacon and creamy sauce.

items.name: Baja Chicken
items.description: Grilled chicken, crispy bacon, melted cheddar, and onions, topped with our blue-ribbon BBQ sauce and smoky chipotle mayo, served toasted.
items.simplified_description: Grilled chicken sandwich with bacon and BBQ sauce.

items.name: Mesquite Chicken
items.description: Grilled chicken, crispy smoky bacon, melted cheddar cheese, fresh lettuce, tomatoes, and onions, with creamy ranch dressing, served toasted.
items.simplified_description: Grilled chicken sandwich with bacon and ranch dressing.

items.name: Ultimate Turkey Club
items.description: The ultimate turkey club with oven roasted turkey breast and crisp bacon, fresh lettuce, tomatoes, and mayo, served toasted.
items.simplified_description: Turkey club sandwich with bacon and veggies.

items.name: Honey Bacon Club
items.description: A flavor-packed twist on a traditional club made with oven roasted turkey breast, smoked ham, crispy bacon, melted Swiss cheese, fresh lettuce, tomatoes, and onions, with a tangy sweet honey French dressing, served toasted.
items.simplified_description: Club sandwich with turkey, ham, bacon, and honey dressing.

items.name: Peppercorn Steak
items.description: Black Angus steak with melted provolone cheese, sauteed onions and our tangy, slightly spicy peppercorn sauce, served toasted.
items.simplified_description: Steak sandwich with cheese and peppercorn sauce.

items.name: Turkey Bacon Guacamole
items.description: A Southwest classic made with oven roasted turkey breast, crispy bacon, creamy guacamole, melted provolone, fresh lettuce, tomatoes, and onions, with ranch dressing, served toasted.
items.simplified_description: Turkey sandwich with bacon and guacamole.

items.name: Ham & Cheese Meal
items.description: Includes mini Ham & Cheese sub or flatbread, chips or kids cookie and a kids drink.
items.simplified_description: Kids meal with ham and cheese sandwich, chips or cookie, and drink.

items.description: Includes mini Triple Cheese sub or flatbread, chips or kids cookie and a kids drink.
items.simplified_description: Kids meal with cheese sandwich, chips or cookie, and drink.

items.name: Turkey & Cheese Meal

items.simplified_description: Kids meal with turkey and cheese sandwich, chips or cookie, and drink.

items.name: Broccoli Cheese
items.description: Creamy and cheesy soup with broccoli and carrots.
items.simplified_description: Soup made with broccoli and cheese.

items.name: Classic Tots
items.description: Toasty coin tots, crisped to perfection in our toaster oven.
items.simplified_description: Crispy potato tots.

items.name: Bacon Jalapeño Cheddar Loaded Tots
items.description: Toasty tots loaded up with crisp bacon, cheddar cheese and jalapenos.
items.simplified_description: Potato tots with bacon, cheese, and jalapenos.
